question: Was there any drop in Cash & Cash equivalents between FY 2023 and Q2 of FY2024?
gold_answer: Yes, there was a decline of ~42% between FY2023 and Q2 of FY 2024.
predicted: Yes, there was a drop in Cash & Cash equivalents between FY 2023 and Q2 of FY 2024. According to the Condensed Consolidated Balance Sheet, Cash and cash equivalents decreased from $1,874 million as of January 28, 2023 (end of FY 2023) to $1,093 million as of July 29, 2023 (Q2 FY 2024), representing a decline of $781 million.
reasoning: Now I have the actual balance sheet data. Looking at the Cash and cash equivalents line: July 29, 2023 shows $1,093 million and January 28, 2023 shows $1,874 million. This is a decrease of $781 million ($1,874 - $1,093 = $781 million).
label: AL
